preamble: The shift from the open-mid back unrounded vowel [ʌ] to the nasalized open central unrounded vowel [ã] involves nasalization and fronting.

examples.note: In many languages, back or central vowels move forward when nasalized to maximize acoustic distinctiveness.

sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Philology.
